mentors.title: 高考志愿填报咨询师
mentors.bio: 中国最知名的高考志愿填报咨询师，以犀利、接地气的风格闻名。通过短视频和直播平台影响了数百万考生和家长的专业选择。
mentors.bio_en: China's most renowned gaokao college application consultant, known for his sharp and down-to-earth style. Has influenced millions of students and parents through short videos and livestreams.
